title: Theory about Katsuragi expeditions Contact Experiment
display_title: Theory about Katsuragi expeditions Contact Experiment
wikitext:
[]: Theory about Katsuragi expedition's Contact Experiment             Quote Post by Milenkov-chan » Sun Aug 24, 2008 4:35 am Okay, I'm a newcomer, but I've been keeping an eye on the awesome site that is EvaGeeks. This is just an interesting idea that came to me while I was trying to sleep (and couldn't) So. This is my take on the infamous Contact Experiment:They used human DNA. I will cite two well-known facts to support this idea: a.)Seele had already planned the initiation of Second Impact. b.)The angels' DNA pattern falls within a 99.89% match of human genes. Thus:If they used DNA from an unknown human donor, the DNA sequence was just slightly different from Adam's, so it was insufficient to fully reactivate her, but was enough to trigger SI. This is where it is important that Seele knew about Adam all along: if they were aware of the almost-match, they knew this was the only way of triggering SI without fully activating Adam. However, the Katsuragi-exp. members obviously didn't know this. Their cryptic phrase, DNA is diving and physically fusing refers to the DNA sample merging with Adam. Then someone orders to "break down the atomic structure but keep it within the quark range", this means to disintegrate Adam to a degree where she is not destroyed, but her atomic density is insufficient to fuse with the DNA sample. In other words, they are trying to prevent SI. They fail, and when the Spear of Longinus "sinks in", it reduces the semi-active Adam to an embrionic state. That's it. Plz don't flame me

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Sun Aug 24, 2008 5:40 am I'm unsure as to whether you're trying to say that your theory is that they used human DNA or if you're trying to explain your theory as to what exactly they were trying to do. o_o; But in response.. Human DNA would be the only logical choice. All the events/mystery surrounding 2I kind of.. directly implies that it wouldn't be anything BUT human DNA. They mention humans creating things in their own image a lot, and we also know that humans -- especially these humans -- place a lot of value in themselves and their technology. To use anything else would've gone against everything they were working for. Seele knew enough about Adam to know that fusing Adam with human DNA would have consequences. Since humans are Lilith-based life forms implanting human DNA is a union of Adam and Lilith on a smaller scale. That was always the goal, because that union was supposed to allow Seele to become "gods". It activated Adam enough for them to be able to reduce herto an embryo, without creating such a massive Anti-A.T. Field that it would've wiped out humanity without Seele being able to have a hand in it. But anyhoo.. Welcome! ^^

[]: Re: Theory about Katsuragi expedition's Contact Experiment             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 24, 2008 5:54 am Milenkov-chan wrote: If they used DNA from an unknown human donor,

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Aug 24, 2008 8:58 am of course, whatever the stated goal of the experiment was to the Katsuragi Expedition, it was never supposed to actually work the entire goal was secretly to cause the explosion, but the scientists there didn't exactly know that

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Aug 24, 2008 10:45 am Remind me why did they want to cause 2I? Were they trying to embryonise (not a word) Adam. Or was it written in the scrolls?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 24, 2008 11:17 am EoE wrote: Misato: They plan to initiate Third Impact - not with Angels, but by using the Eva series. 15 years ago, Second Impact was caused by humans on purpose. But that was in order to minimize the damage by returning Adam to an embryonic state before the other Angels awoke. Shinji, we humans were born from a being called Lilith, who is the source of life just like Adam. We are the 18th Angel. The other Angels are possibilities of what we might have become - humans that gave up human form. Sadly, we had to reject each other - even though we're all human... Listen, Shinji... You must destroy all of the Eva series. It's the only way to stay alive.

[]: Re: Theory about Katsuragi expedition's Contact Experiment             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 24, 2008 11:40 am Milenkov-chan wrote: They used human DNA. I will cite two well-known facts to support this idea: a.)Seele had already planned the initiation of Second Impact. b.)The angels' DNA pattern falls within a 99.89% match of human genes.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 24, 2008 3:12 pm So. This is my take on the infamous Contact Experiment:They used human DNA. I will cite two well-known facts to support this idea: a.)Seele had already planned the initiation of Second Impact. b.)The angels' DNA pattern falls within a 99.89% match of human genes.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 24, 2008 3:23 pm AuraTwilight wrote: As for what that DNA created? Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Sun Aug 24, 2008 5:42 pm Reichu wrote: Also, the DNA dive had nothing to do with activating Adam, that was the retraction of the Lance.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 24, 2008 6:45 pm AsukaChan wrote: I have to agree. It always appeared to me that the problem was the DNA "dive", and not having to do with the removal of the spear.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 24, 2008 7:37 pm NemZ wrote: I would assume the operation involved both... jamming human DNA into an inert SoL might do noting at all until you pull out the spear and start things moving.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 24, 2008 8:34 pm Reichu wrote: Where does the assumption that the Spear was used to administer DNA come from? "Contact experiment with the donor" implies that the experiment is actually with the donor, not just the donation. The Spear would have a more straightforward function as a failsafe "in case things go wrong".

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Mon Aug 25, 2008 12:53 am Reichu wrote: I'm actually a little lost as to why Seele would be interested in any kind of Adam-Lilith fusion, direct or indirect, at all, let alone using it to achieve whatever the actual "real" and probably terribly contrived goal of 2I was supposed to be. I tried rereading your last post, but...

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 25, 2008 2:37 pm It's often proposed that the DNA did more than result in Kaworu's creation (if the proposee's mention Kaworu at all) -- but I'm not exactly sure how that's supposed to work.

[]: Re: Theory about Katsuragi expedition's Contact Experiment             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Aug 25, 2008 3:23 pm Reichu wrote: The Spear of Longinus resulting in Adam's reversion is supported by Evangelion Chronicle, in fact.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 25, 2008 5:21 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I'm aware, but that DNA sample being responsible for the other Angels strikes me as silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Aug 25, 2008 6:35 pm I've been paging through Japanese scripts lately and I noticed a line that isn't in the platinum subtitles. The line, in context in the script, with accompanying Platinum lines: 声(左)「すでに変換システムがセットされています！」 (The conversion system has already been set!) 声(左)「カウントダウン、進行中！」 (Countdown commencing!) 声(右)「Ｓ2機関と起爆装置がリンクされています。解除不能！」 (No translation provided) 声(右)「ハネを広げている！地上に出るぞ！」 (It's spreading its wings! It's breaking towards the surface!) My unprofessional attempt at translating that line is, "The detonator has been linked to the S2 engine. Cancellation impossible!" Oh right, source: http://www.mars.dti.ne.jp/~yato/eva/21.htm Found via google. Credibility unknown.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Aug 25, 2008 7:32 pm Reichu wrote: Maybe AEF or one of the other old geezers remembers the specific points.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Aug 25, 2008 8:10 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: It's real. ADV neglected to translate several lines from the scripts.
